title: senecio × oyensis
intro: Senecio × oyensis, also known as the buttercup ragwort or Oxford ragwort, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the United Kingdom. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. In herbal medicine, Senecio × oyensis is used to treat various health conditions, such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal the skin. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
